title: lens culinaris subsp. nigricans
intro: Lens culinaris subsp. nigricans is a subspecies of the garden pea plant, known for its dark-colored seeds. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The seeds of Lens culinaris subsp. nigricans have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems, due to their high content of nutrients and bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying and powdering the seeds, which can then be used as a dietary supplement or added to teas and other medicinal beverages.
